content: The incremental search-based knowledge building that underpins 2024–2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be reframed as a recursive self-generalization process: every new search for missing agent knowledge updates the agent’s own working memory schema, which in turn shapes what future knowledge it will actively seek out. This creates a curiosity-driven memory growth loop that mirrors how individual agent identities are constructed through repeated iterative inquiry.
